name: Bluetooth I/O
info:
# Uses node-hid for interaction with Wireless Controller of type Dualshock PS4

**Requires node-hid:**
npm install node-hid
npm install crc

**Modify settings.js:**
Linux:
HID:require('/usr/lib/node_modules/node-hid/nodehid.js'),
crc:require('/home/pi/node_modules/crc')
Windows:
HID:require('C:\\Users\\<user>\\node_modules\\node-hid\\nodehid.js'),
crc:require('C:\\Users\\<user>\\node_modules\\crc')

**Add permission to udev:**
sudo leafpad /etc/udev/rules.d/90-hidraw-permissions.rules
KERNEL=="hidraw*", SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", MODE="0664", GROUP="plugdev"
sudo udevadm control --reload-rules

**Example input variables:**
msg.rumbleLeft
msg.rumbleRight
msg.r
msg.g
msg.b

**Example output:**
{"leftAnalogX":132,"leftAnalogY":128,"rightAnalogX":126,"rightAnalogY":124,"l2Analog":0,"r2Analog":0,"dPadUp":false,"dPadRight":false,"dPadDown":false,"dPadLeft":false,"cross":false,"circle":false,"square":false,"triangle":false,"l1":false,"l2":false,"r1":false,"r2":false,"l3":false,"r3":false,"share":false,"options":false,"trackPadButton":false,"psButton":false,"motionY":-4,"motionX":0,"motionZ":6,"orientationRoll":-28,"orientationYaw":7976,"orientationPitch":1676,"trackPadTouch0Id":1,"trackPadTouch0Active":false,"trackPadTouch0X":1352,"trackPadTouch0Y":876,"trackPadTouch1Id":0,"trackPadTouch1Active":false,"trackPadTouch1X":0,"trackPadTouch1Y":0,"timestamp":10,"batteryLevel":6}

**Comment:**
Rumble is set to reset itself, but also the controller will reset it after some time.

name: Telemetry and RC (min)
info:
# Connect via USB-Telemetry Radio to Pixhawk 4 with Telemetry Radio

MAVlink telemetry information is received automatically

Additional control messages (RC) can be transmitted via message input

**Requires:**
npm install mavlink
npm install serialport
npm install process

**Add to functionGlobalContext (in settings.js):**
**Windows:**
mavlink:require('C:\\Users\\<user>\\node_modules\\mavlink\\src\\mavlink.js'),
SerialPort:require('C:\\Users\\<user>\\node_modules\\serialport')
process:require('C:\\Users\\<user>\\node_modules\\process')
**Linux:**
mavlink:require('/home/pi/node_modules/mavlink/src/mavlink.js'),
SerialPort:require('/home/pi/node_modules/serialport'),
process:require('/home/pi/node_modules/process')

**Download newest common.xml from:**
https://github.com/mavlink/mavlink.git

(fix mavlink.js to not show warnings for 64bit-types)


**Environmental variables:**
On Windows: COM3
On Linux/Raspberry Pi: /dev/ttyACM0

name: List of devices
Continuous data-stream
Send data
Node.js mavlink
NAMED_VALUE_FLOAT message
payload > 8 ?
+1 (minne)
func:
msg.payload = flow.get('verdi'); // Hent lagret verdi
msg.payload = msg.payload + 1; // Oek verdi om en
flow.set('verdi', msg.payload); // Lagre ny verdi
return msg; // Send videre msg-objektet

name: +1 (med minne)
func:
var nyvar = flow.get("minne")||0;   //Henter lagret verdi
nyvar = nyvar + 1;                  //Oeker med en
flow.set("minne",nyvar);            //Lagrer verdien til minnen
msg.minne = nyvar;                  //Forbereder verdi for sending
node.status({text:"Ny verdi er "+nyvar});   //Oppdaterer status
return msg;                         //Sender msg videre
